series_metadata.series_title: Prevention, Retention and Contingency (PRC) County Plans
series_metadata.series_description: The Prevention, Retention, and Contingency County Plans outline each county's use of specified Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) funds to support low-income individuals with temporary needs such as, housing, clothing, and work supports. These Files contain plans submitted by county agencies for review, to include initial submissions, and amendments.
